title: Princess O'Hara
writer: Damon Runyon, Harry Clork, Doris Malloy
actors: Jean Parker, Chester Morris, Leon Errol
plot: King, the driver of a horse-drawn hansom cab, is killed in a turf war between Vic Toledo's cab company and his competitors. Vic sends his goons to get King's daughter Princess a new horse but they steal a prized racing horse.
